title: VietnamWarData: Download Vietnam War Datasets Declassified by NARA
description: An R package providing functions to download and locally cache cleaned, analysis-ready Vietnam War datasets declassified by the U.S. National Archives and Records Administration (NARA). Includes ground combat incidents, U.S. casualty records, hamlet evaluation surveys, naval gunfire missions, psychological operations, base area assessments, and a combined incident-level ground combat database. Companion to Smith (2025), Conflict Management and Peace Science.
